title: Oneblock: Language pack
description: Adds Language Support for Oneblock Original by Crimson Creations
body:
## **About**
**Vítejte, Välkommen, Welcome to Oneblock!**
This resource pack serves as a direct extension for the Oneblock Original map. It translates all texts into multiple languages, supporting a better gameplay experience.

Resource pack can translate all the fun from Advancements, Progress bar to villager interaction and much more!

## **Supported Languages**
- English
- Czech
- Dutch
- Finnish
- German
- Polish
- Spanish
- Ukrainian
- Vietnamese
- French
- Japanese (work in progress)
